name: Monbanquet — Front-end Developer (Freelance)
description: Monbanquet promotes artisanal catering service and tailor-made buffets for professional events. As a freelance front-end developer (November 2019 – January 2020), I integrated their new graphic identity on their website: working with design and communication teams to provide an adequate technical solution, and collaborating with the back-end team to align with the new architecture.
